title: polystichopsis lurida
intro: Polystichopsis lurida, also known as Yellow Spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Polystichopsis lurida is valued for its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its health benefits, and is often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
